title: Simply Wynncraft
description: A simple and lightweight Wynncraft modpack
body:
# Simply Wynncraft

UPDATED TO **WYNNCRAFT: REKINDLED WORLD** UPDATE 🔥🔥🔥

Currently on Minecraft 1.21.

A lightweight, Fabric-based modpack that includes essential performance related additions, as well as a few cosmetic changes that aim to enhance your experience in [Wynncraft](https://wynncraft.com/).

This modpack is meant for Wynncraft only.

## Key Features

- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and a suite of performance mods
- [Wynntils](https://modrinth.com/mod/wynntils) the essential Wynncraft companion mod
- [CameraOverhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/cameraoverhaul) and [Camera Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/camera-utils) for a more immersive experience
- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/complementary-reimagined) edited with performance in mind
- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) for increased render distance on the server

## Installation

**REQUIRES JAVA 21**

Use your preferred MC launcher. Instructions [here](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/modpacks/playing_modpacks/)

## Changelist

<details><summary>Version 2.0.0 Changes</summary>

### Changes
- Updated to Minecraft version 1.21 to keep up with Wynntils
### Added
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
- Controlling
- Distant Horizons
- Fzzy Config
- Indium
- Inventory Essentials
- kennytvs epic force close loading screen mod for fabric
- Krypton
- ModernFix
- Searchables
### Removed
- Better Beds
- Bobby
- Borderless Mining
- Chunks Fade In
- ClickThrough
- Cull Less Leaves
- Drip Sounds
- FabricSkyBoxes
- FastAnim
- Forge Config API Port
- Global Packs
- LazyDFU
- Memory Leak Fix
- Mouse Wheelie
- Smooth Swapping

</details>

<details><summary>Version 1.2.0 Changes</summary>

### Changes
- Updated to Minecraft version 1.20.2 to keep up with Wynntils
- Moved to Fabric from Quilt
### Added
- Better Third Person
- Enhanced Block Entities
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- Particle Core
### Removed
- Better Biome Blend
- Clear Skies
- DashLoader
- Equipment Compare
- Extra Sounds (Ported)
- Fastload
- InvMove
- Legendary Tooltips
- Quilted Fabric API
- Smooth Boot
- Sound Categories (Ported)
- Starlight

</details>

<details><summary>Version 1.1.0 Changes</summary>

### Added
- AmbientSounds
- Balm
- ClickThrough
- CreativeCore
- Debugify
- Default Options
- Drip Sounds
- Equipment Compare
- Extra Sounds (Ported)
- Forge Config API Port
- Global Packs
- Iceberg
- InvMove
- Language Reload
- Legendary Tooltips
- MoreChatHistory
- Mouse Wheelie
- PaperDoll
- Prism
- Sound Categories (Ported)
- Tiny Item Animations
- Wavey Capes
### Removed
- AntiGhost
- Continuity
- Entity Collision FPS Fix
- FabricSkyBoxes Interop
- Indium
- Lazy Language Loader
- Fast Better Grass

</details>

<details><summary>Version 1.0.0 Changes</summary>

Initial release.

</details>

## Disclaimer

I cannot guarantee that the mods in this list may or may not be compliant with the terms of the Wynncraft server.

Github not listed yet, join the Discord to address any issues.
